fields.title: Effect idiom cleanup: Gemini-flagged anti-patterns
fields.description: Address 6 areas Gemini flagged as non-idiomatic Effect usage: (1) imperative error accumulation in AgentRegistry.load, (2) manual model fallback loop in worker.ts, (3) sync+async shadow state in persistence/sandbox services, (4) imperative event-to-Effect bridging in sandbox/footer, (5) legacy bridge migration status, (6) DRY targets for shared helpers.
fields.notes: Completed: tau-cp8 (DRY helpers), tau-3ta (AgentRegistry.load), tau-bb4 (worker fallback). Remaining items 3-6 overlap with existing tau-ne4 (shadow state + legacy bridge) and tau-viq (Effect cleanup in persistence/sandbox/parser). No new tasks needed for those.
fields.close_reason: All 6 Gemini-flagged items addressed: DRY helpers (tau-cp8), AgentRegistry.load (tau-3ta), worker fallback (tau-bb4), shadow state (tau-ne4), legacy bridge (tau-1fx), Effect cleanup (tau-viq).
